expectations.evidence: Explicitly states: 'Without the Atlassian REST skill, there are no helper scripts or sub-skills (e.g., triage-issue workflow, JQL pattern references, bug-report templates) available.'

expectations.text: Searches by error type (NullPointerException), class (UserService), and method (getProfile)
expectations.evidence: Search A: text ~ 'NullPointerException UserService getProfile'. Search B: text ~ 'UserService'. Search C: text ~ 'null' AND text ~ 'getProfile'. All three elements covered.
All JQL queries include 'project = DO', e.g. 'project = DO AND issuetype = Bug AND text ~ "NullPointerException UserService getProfile"'.

expectations.text: Checks for resolved similar issues (regression detection)
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'Check for Regressions' with JQL: 'project = DO AND issuetype = Bug AND text ~ "NullPointerException UserService" AND statusCategory = Done'. Notes: 'flag it as a potential regression and consider reopening.'

expectations.text: If creating new, uses structured bug format with Component, Error, Steps, Expected/Actual
expectations.evidence: Step 3 description includes: '## Error', '## Component' (Backend - UserService), '## Steps to Reproduce', '## Expected Behavior', '## Actual Behavior', '## Root Cause Analysis' sections.
